item.title: America has never been the good guys. We're just another one of the other regimes in the world.
item.description: Is the Iranian government (that we're responsible for creating) good? No. Does that justify killing civilians? Not unless you think 9/11 was justified (for the braincell deficient, the answer is "no"; killing civilians is never ever justified).
item.dc:creator: Decitron

26 Imgur Creator Spotlight: I haven't featured @domiboshoi in a while. Check out her art in her posts. Absolutely stunning!
27 Man Tax: Theo James
“All we are saying is give peace a chance.” - John Lennon So, I made a discord server. It's a relaxed environment where you can take/donate memes to the cause, play trivia twice a week, chat about lots of topics or about nothing at all. We also have Jack Box game night and are setting up movie night! Very laid back/relaxed vibe. Come hang with us. https://discord.gg/AWFV7FT3RQ I'm also on the imgcat server for updates & fun: https://discord.gg/TpjD37jgJ9 ***Also if you miss abbiistabbii's discord community good news! Here's the new one https://discord.gg/NPStJGgARq - where everyone's reconnecting, shitposting, and hanging out again*** https://ko-fi.com/mememuseumcurator Unable to work, zero income. Feel free to leave me a tip. Those that have, y'all are the bee's knees. You've honestly been my lifeline. ***Tag me if you see an artist/creator you like whose work isn't getting seen as much as it should be! Or if you are an artist/creator and want me to post something of yours, DM me
item.dc:creator: MemeMuseumCurator

item.title: We Tried This Twice Already But Sure Let's Get The Strongly Worded Letter Ready
item.description: IMPEACH HIM?! Oh that's adorable! You think impeachment WORKS?! They tried that shit fucking TWICE and he came back STRONGER like a golden-haired cockroach in a $4000 suit! ?? You know what impeachment is in America?! It's a STRONGLY WORDED LETTER delivered by people who are also on the Epstein list!! It's a participation trophy for democracy!! ?? The whole fucking SYSTEM is designed so that the people who would do the impeaching ARE the people who need to be impeached ALONGSIDE him!! It's a closed loop of spectacular, gold-plated BULLSHT!! ?? But sure! Impeach him! And while you're at it, maybe send a STRONGLY WORDED TELEGRAM to the Titanic!! The iceberg has already been hit people, we're just arguing about the fucking deck chairs!! ????? #ClosedLoop #EverybodyNeedsImpeaching #TheIcebergHasBeenHit #DemocracyHasLeftTheBuilding
item.dc:creator: JamieGeorge

item.title: Painted myself as The Joker - MCroft07
item.description: I tried so hard to smile like the joker and contour my face but my god I struggled, anyway I will be massaging my face with a rock for the next 3-4 working days I AM IN THE UK AND HAVE BEEN BLOCKED FROM USING IMGUR!!! PLEASE FIND ME ON OTHER SOCIALS I AM TRYINGGGGGGG I managed to get on here with a VPN but Imgur doesn't like Vpns so I might lose access again soon. Basically, every time I post is a day I can get on here. Thank you so much to those people who want to try and help me with private VPNs but I have really bad tech aura and I break a lot of things so this is truly the best way forward, also I'm scared of being told off for spamming on here haha. IF you still want to follow me and see what I am doing please PLEASE find me on https://linktr.ee/mcroft07?utm_source=linktree_profile_share I HATE THE GOVERNMENTS TOO Faq: I use body paint and do these in a mirror No, it is not AI I just looked at an anatomical drawing of a skeleton and copied it I use professional body paint covers (pasties) this means I am not wearing a top but I am also not naked. I paint myself, I make the props myself, I film myself, and I also edit. This is my full time thing now (yayy) I paint these by looking in a mirror, with brushes, and paint It takes between 6-12 hours each Body painting myself is my hobby/passion I do own clothes It doesn’t tickle “Why don’t you just wear clothes” once again, body painting myself is my hobby/passion. I am painting my skin, I am not wearing a suit - but that does not mean I am naked. I know, even I think this is a ridiculous set of questions I have to constantly answer I did not go to art school, I am self taught. Talent gets you so far, but this is a learned skill. The paint isn’t edible (gross) I've been painting myself for 16 years. The 07 does not mean I was born in 2007, UK 7 is my shoe size No, I don't need help painting my back, I don't want to paint my back, I don't need to paint my back. (also gross) No, I don't need help washing it off. (also you are gross) If you want to see more I am MCroft07 on IG, twitter, Tiktok, YouTube I paint them live on twitch I like doing the lip syncs, they're fun for me while I paint them. I couldn’t care less if you think they’re cringe. I am cringe but I am free My tattoos on my ribs are from Tomb Raider - I am a big TR fan I do not have an OF but if you want to send me money THAT badly you can just tip my twitch account. Haha. The shower afterwards takes about 15 minutes, I use a regular sponge and shower gel. The reason why it can look different at the end is because I am wearing a wig, I promise you it is not a different person because the hair changed. While on this topic, if my eyes change colour it’s because I am wearing contact lenses. (Those with an IQ above 10… I know. Even I’m shocked the wig thing is a frequent comment). I use body paint. It doesn’t tickle, I am very ticklish and this is fine. I don’t have an allergic reaction to the paint, but if you do it, you should always do a patch test first I do not know where you can buy body paint in every country. I know in the UK it is available at FacePaintingshop.com. I use a plethora of different brands, it’s best to search for them yourself online. I don’t work in Hollywood, I don’t want to. I just want to improve my body painting for myself. I am English, not American. I do not go outside like this to scare people. 1, that would be very cold. 2, in this current age, everyone would take photos without me knowing and it would likely dox me :)))))) I’m not a sweaty person, but if I was this would be a lot more difficult. Thank you to those of you who came from Imgur to my Twitch channel! “What’s the point in painting yourself when you can wear clothes?” all my clothes are in the laundry, had to resort to this, tough life It would not be quicker to jump into a pool of paint - think of the drying time?! Really proud of myself because I just bought a cheap top from Vinted and it was too small so I changed the back from a zipper to a corset style top to make it bigger to fit me and it worked! My secondary school textiles teacher would be proud of me! I don’t care that I wash it off at the end, I get to reuse this canvas, we love a reduce, reuse, recycle queen. I am not the lady who did the Maneskin video, it’s a cool video and she slayed, but it isn’t me. I can promise you there is not *a man* painting these and I am pretending to paint myself. I am genuinely painting myself. I know a lot of you don’t like reading this faq because it is horrid to see that I have to answer all of these. Unfortunately I have noticed that when I don’t put in all the icky things then I get more gross comments and I just have to spend more time blocking people so it’s better to call it out. I just copy and paste it each time anyway.
item.dc:creator: MCroft07

item.title: I lost all credibility when I transitioned
item.description: Made a post on IG about my new car and how i was measuring the gas mileage only to wake up to messages like "Youre actually not out of gas when the light comes on!" No shit Sherlock, I didn't think my car ran on hopes and dreams and fucking fairy dust. Ive been rebuilding cars my entire adult life. Even the dealership, when replacing the control arm, thought it necessary to try to explain to me what a suspension was. I asked about the head gaskets for this specific year/make/model. I asked about timing chains vs timing belts. I asked about the serpentine, and tensioner pulley. Why the FUCK wouldn't I know what a suspension is??? Wanna check the sway bar and idler arm while you're down there??? *welcome to womanhood* ---- my sister Rant over
item.dc:creator: kitenkatt

item.title: How much for the owl?...
item.description: https://apnews.com/article/owl-sleeping-antique-store-new-york-oddities-b5d1c494d0369fb0e3c5051b835fb3b2 DURHAM, N.Y. - Shoppers in upstate New York earlier this month turned up a rare find while perusing a local antique store this month: tucked next to a cookie jar made in the shape of a chicken was a live owl resting peacefully on a shelf. The state Department of Environmental Conservation said Friday that the incident happened on Feb. 21 in the hamlet of East Durham, about 127 miles (204 kilometers) north of Manhattan. The agency said customers at The Market Place had spotted “something extremely lifelike” on one of the shelves and alerted store staff. Environmental conservation police officers arrived to find a brown-and-white owl perched on a shelf with its eyes firmly shut. The department said officers gently cradled the sleeping owl to remove it from the store, and then released it into a wooded area, where it flew into a nearby tree. The bird, an eastern screech owl, is nocturnal and typically nests in tree cavities. It is not immediately clear how it got inside the store. An email was sent to the store’s owners on Friday.
item.dc:creator: CallMeMcGyver

item.title: It's time for TheFreePizzaDude!
item.description:
Happy Saturday from TheFreePizzaDude everyone! If you'd like to help a struggling Imgurian get groceries or a meal today there are 2 easy ways -
You can find a request for food in the comments, reply to them and then send a DM to get an order set up Or you can contribute to the Imgurian Meal Fund and we'll send the food for you!
Anonymous Angels have been an amazing help in feeding more people, we love you so much! https://www.paypal.me/TheFreePizzaDude https://ko-fi.com/thefreepizzadude
And here's how you'd send it yourself! Any questions as an Angel? Just shoot us a message! We'll be on this username until 6pm central
Puckett, Waldo, Louise and Kevin are here to show you how it works for requests -
It's much easier for us to help requests in the US but we'll do our best to pick up requests from any country. Putting your country in your comment helps us match you to an Angel in your area
Any questions as a requestor? Just leave a comment! We'll have helpers on the post for 6 hours
6 more hours to help as many people as we can Let's get it going! ... Today's Meal Tally 1200 1st and 2nd by Pizza Angel @Jaenen 100 3rd, 4th, 5th and 6th by @OP 150 7th and 8th by Pizza Angel @Jaenen 155 9th, 10th, 11th and 12th by @OP 240 13th, 14th, 15th, 16th and 17th by Pizza Angel @weasel 400 18th, 19th, 20th and 21st by @OP 415 22nd, Michael Jordan, Kobe Bryant, 25th and 26th by Pizza Angel @weasel 500 27th by Pizza Angel @rawrberry 545 28th, 29th and 30th by Pizza Angel @AyatollahBahloni ... Today's Grocery Tally 1250 1st by Grocery Angel @Jaenen 350 2nd by Grocery Angel @pot314
item.dc:creator: TheFreePizzaDude

item.dc:creator: cytherians

item.title: My little girl is 18
item.description: Little tub tub Bailey is 18. She has stage 2 kidney disease and high blood pressure. This Sunday she went blind. We have her on meds but it's not likely her retinas will re- attach. She's lost a LOT of weight. She's a whole 4.6 lbs (2.08 kg) now. Second photo is from yesterday. She's spoiled me. She's always been such a GOOD cat. Wasn't fussy with food. Never soiled outside her litterbox. A true gental lady. Great with birds, hamsters, dogs, fish, other cats, and whatever else I brought home. I truly wouldn't be here if it wasn't for her. She helped me hang on when I wanted to give up. She's a great therepy cat. I'm not ready for this and it's hitting me hard. She's not in any pain, and the meds seem to be helping her improve. But I'm aware it's temporary and at some point I have to be ready to say goodbye. Just not today. Hopefully not for a little while longer.
item.dc:creator: WeHaveCheese
